mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO employee_information(id, age, created_date, company_id, qq_no, wechat_no, staff_no, staff_name, id_card_no, id_card_type, birthday, sex, mobile_no, email, work_phone, work_email, marry_status, highest_education, nationality, native_place, native_place_province_code, native_place_city_code, political_status, nick_name, blood_type, spouse_name, child_name, emergency_contact_name, emergency_contact_mobile, staff_status, staff_type, leave_date, probation_end_date, enroll_in_date, probation_length, contract_begin_date, contract_end_date, positive_date, hukou_type, hukou_address, hukou_province_code, hukou_city_code, living_address, living_province_code, living_city_code, department_id, department_name, corporation_name, corporation_id, position_name, position_id, job_title_name, job_title_id, supervisor_name, supervisor_id, position_level_id, position_level_name, last_name, first_name, legal_name, work_place, contract_type, is_deleted, delete_date, quit_type, last_work_day, staff_origin, initial_work_years, enroll_work_years, first_level_department_id, first_level_department_name, staff_remark, quit_reason, quit_reason_type, quit_remind_staff, lunar_birthday_year, lunar_birthday_month, lunar_birthday_day, next_solar_birthday, reinstate_number, company_site_id, company_site_name, country, is_probation, probation_status, create_time, update_time) VALUES
(#{item.id}, #{item.age}, #{item.createdDate}, #{item.companyId}, #{item.qqNo}, #{item.wechatNo}, #{item.staffNo}, #{item.staffName}, #{item.idCardNo}, #{item.idCardType}, #{item.birthday}, #{item.sex}, #{item.mobileNo}, #{item.email}, #{item.workPhone}, #{item.workEmail}, #{item.marryStatus}, #{item.highestEducation}, #{item.nationality}, #{item.nativePlace}, #{item.nativePlaceProvinceCode}, #{item.nativePlaceCityCode}, #{item.politicalStatus}, #{item.nickName}, #{item.bloodType}, #{item.spouseName}, #{item.childName}, #{item.emergencyContactName}, #{item.emergencyContactMobile}, #{item.staffStatus}, #{item.staffType}, #{item.leaveDate}, #{item.probationEndDate}, #{item.enrollInDate}, #{item.probationLength}, #{item.contractBeginDate}, #{item.contractEndDate}, #{item.positiveDate}, #{item.hukouType}, #{item.hukouAddress}, #{item.hukouProvinceCode}, #{item.hukouCityCode}, #{item.livingAddress}, #{item.livingProvinceCode}, #{item.livingCityCode}, #{item.departmentId}, #{item.departmentName}, #{item.corporationName}, #{item.corporationId}, #{item.positionName}, #{item.positionId}, #{item.jobTitleName}, #{item.jobTitleId}, #{item.supervisorName}, #{item.supervisorId}, #{item.positionLevelId}, #{item.positionLevelName}, #{item.lastName}, #{item.firstName}, #{item.legalName}, #{item.workPlace}, #{item.contractType}, #{item.isDeleted}, #{item.deleteDate}, #{item.quitType}, #{item.lastWorkDay}, #{item.staffOrigin}, #{item.initialWorkYears}, #{item.enrollWorkYears}, #{item.firstLevelDepartmentId}, #{item.firstLevelDepartmentName}, #{item.staffRemark}, #{item.quitReason}, #{item.quitReasonType}, #{item.quitRemindStaff}, #{item.lunarBirthdayYear}, #{item.lunarBirthdayMonth}, #{item.lunarBirthdayDay}, #{item.nextSolarBirthday}, #{item.reinstateNumber}, #{item.companySiteId}, #{item.companySiteName}, #{item.country}, #{item.isProbation}, #{item.probationStatus}, GETDATE(), GETDATE())
